title: Scottish election 2026: Results in maps and charts
description: A guide to how the 2026 Holyrood election panned out.
content:
The SNP is the biggest winner in the Scottish Parliament election but its tally of 58 seats is short of a majority.

title: No leadership pressure on Badenoch despite Tory losses
description: The Tories had a grim night at the polls, losing seats to both Reform and the Liberal Democrats.
content:
The Conservatives have suffered heavy losses in elections across the UK, with both Reform and the Liberal Democrats taking votes off Kemi Badenoch's party.
In England, the Tories lost more than 500 seats and lost control six councils, while in Wales ... [1198 chars]

title: UFO documents released by Pentagon describe floating objects and flashes of light
description: The US has published transcripts, video clips and audio recordings about unidentified flying objects, also called unidentified anomalous phenomena.
content:
The tranche of never-before-seen documents released by the Pentagon on UFOs includes descriptions of reported sightings - by civilians on Earth and by astronauts on the Moon.
The documents, spanning decades, were declassified and posted online on Fri... [3273 chars]

title: Attenborough at 100: Prince William congratulates Sir David on 'remarkable milestone'
description: The naturalist's seven-decade career was marked with a special concert at the Royal Albert Hall.
content:
Prince William has congratulated Sir David Attenborough on reaching a "remarkable milestone", as the broadcaster and environmentalist celebrated his 100th birthday.

title: Sir David Attenborough to narrate BBC's Blue Planet III
description: Sir David Attenborough and Blue Planet will be back to reveal brand new and untold stories from magical underwater worlds
content:
The Blue Planet, the first ever natural history series to give a comprehensive overview of the world’s oceans, was broadcast across the globe 25 years ago.
